message: Jake
Ginny
Tonny
Hey, is that you?
You look well, I'm jealous.
You don’t look that well, though.
I'm just tired of various things, that's all.
You again.
What do you want?

For a room located in this area, which is particularly expensive in Manhattan, it is quite spacious. This is not a room affordable for common folks.
In the corner of the room, there’s a real grand piano, not some miniature.
I wonder who plays it?
In this large indoor space, there are only a few items that could be called furniture. What are they using this vast space for?
It seems more like he might have developed bipolar disorder rather than just harming his health. I wonder if the events of the last few days are affecting him.
The once arrogant attitude has faded, and he has turned into a man like a soft-spoken gentleman.
The atmosphere is one of indifference to whether this is a filming location or my personal room, as I'm dressed neatly.
I don't think there's anything left I can tell you.
I'm not here trying to pry anything out of you.
Hoo.
Hmm, I didn't know that.
Lately, no one has been paying attention to me, and I'm having a lonely day-to-day life.
How's work going for you?
As for work, I have a performance in the United Kingdom coming up. Until then, I've been taking it a bit easy.
You're just the right conversation partner for me, but for you, isn't it a waste of time?
Right?
On the last day we met, I went straight to Anju's place. I don't recall doing anything to her.
We still don't know her whereabouts.
I hate to say it, but I have a feeling she’s probably not alive anymore.
I mean, she might be dead already.
By the way, when we last met, I heard that Guy's fiancée.
said she came to see him.
Kristy?
Yeah, and I heard she was yelled at about Guy or something.
That’s what I think the story was.
Guy must really be a tough guy, playing around with Call Girls while he has a fiancée.
I wasn’t there, so I don’t know the details.
That’s true.
But, you know, regarding that article.
Guy.
Perhaps because they found out he's a customer.
Anyway, it seems to have turned into an ugly fight among women.
Kristy seemed like a woman who was far removed from going wild with jealousy,
but maybe that wasn't the case after all.
She seems to love Guy deeply,
Women are scary. When they go mad with jealousy, they lose themselves.
You should be careful, don't you think?
Guy seemed fine. I thought he looked a bit heavier. I didn't think he was the culprit then, and I still don’t.
But?
I get the feeling he’s hiding something. It was the same during the party.
It's just my hunch, but it feels like he’s got something shady or something bad going on.
Why do you think that?
Well, it's a gut feeling, you know? I can't say for sure.
Also, I hate to say this, but he was
the last customer, you know.
They said that right before parting.
Is that so?
Yeah.
If I say that, it makes Gai seem suspicious, you know.
There's no doubt that Gai is hiding something inside.
I don’t think I can extract any more,
from him.
Few people are willing to genuinely engage, whether in work or personal life. He's a pathetic man.
Even if the other party is a mobster,
it's because there was a vulnerability. There's no need for sympathy.
It's been quite a while since they went missing, and yet we still can't find them.
Not only that, but they even captivated Guy and other men.
Was she really such an amazing woman?
That Kristy was in a conflict. So, once again, Kristy will be suspected.
For him, it wouldn't matter if his opponent had a fiancée.
Here again with Kristy.
For some reason, her name keeps coming up everywhere.
I guess finding out his fiancée was taken by a call girl must have been quite a shock.
I wonder if Kristy is okay. I hope she isn't being plagued by strange delusions again.
Could Guy really commit murder? He seems completely sane mentally, and his preferences are.
I think he's probably normal.
Even though he has a fiancée named Kristy,
to be infatuated with someone like that is just wrong. I shouldn't have given Kristy up to that kind of guy.
I wonder what Guy is hiding. What secret could he possibly have that he can't tell either me or Kristy?
Thanks for having me.
Oh.
